hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multiple compliance providers into a single operational layer that structures reviews, applies rules, and manages cases to reduce manual workload and strengthen audit trails.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when providers stay disconnected
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams face slow onboarding and duplicated reviews when KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening outputs remain scattered across separate systems. This fragmentation weakens audit readiness, obscures risk context, and complicates coordinated compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening outputs into a unified workflow that routes reviews, preserves audit evidence, and centralizes case management for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to coordinated cases
workflow_description: SFTY organizes fragmented provider results through rules, case opening, review, decision logging and evidence collection into one structured compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond vendor chaos. Structured compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into coordinated workflows, decisions, cases and audit-ready evidence without replacing existing compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by integrating provider outputs into audit-ready workflows that strengthen bank due diligence and enforce enterprise deployment controls.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support coordination of compliance providers
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how workflows connect multiple provider outputs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved across cases
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages fragmented vendor orchestration
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected operational layer connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, case management, regulatory updates and reporting into structured workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY coordinate provider workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates provider outputs by applying internal rules to route reviews, create cases, log decisions and preserve evidence in one connected compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence by maintaining decision logs, case records and provider outputs to support traceability and review readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, linking their outputs into one compliant and auditable operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT or other providers but connects their outputs into structured compliance workflows and decision records.
final_title: Connect provider outputs into structured case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes fragmented vendor checks into coordinated reviews, decisions, evidence and audit-ready compliance cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
